query:
ALTER TABLE police_reports 
ADD COLUMN road_surface VARCHAR(100) AFTER report_document_url,
ADD COLUMN vehicle1_mass INT AFTER road_surface,
ADD COLUMN vehicle2_mass INT AFTER vehicle1_mass,
ADD COLUMN skid_mark_length DECIMAL(10,2) AFTER vehicle2_mass,
ADD COLUMN impact_speed INT AFTER skid_mark_length,
ADD COLUMN road_gradient DECIMAL(5,2) AFTER impact_speed,
ADD COLUMN lighting_condition VARCHAR(100) AFTER road_gradient,
ADD COLUMN traffic_condition VARCHAR(100) AFTER lighting_condition,
ADD COLUMN ocr_extracted TINYINT DEFAULT 0 AFTER traffic_condition,
ADD COLUMN ocr_confidence INT AFTER ocr_extracted,
ADD COLUMN ocr_notes TEXT AFTER ocr_confidence;
